texto: The worldly vision is filled with infinite infatuations and attachments and no one can escape from it
autor: [hence] there is no alternative other than staying in Gnani’s feet [surrendering to the enlightened one is the only alternative].
explicacao: Citação de [hence] there is no alternative other than staying in Gnani’s feet [surrendering to the enlightened one is the only alternative]. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The worldly vision is filled with infinite infatuations and attachments and no one can escape fro…” articula reflexao, dada-bhagwan, worldly em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
